testsuites.name: FIT4110 Lab03 - IoT Ingestion Contract Tests

testsuite.name: 02_Auth / POST /readings - missing token is rejected on real service

testcase.name: Skipped on mock: Prism does not enforce real auth without a service implementation

testsuite.name: 02_Auth / POST /readings - invalid token is rejected on real service

testcase.name: Skipped on mock: invalid token requires real auth middleware

testsuite.name: 03_Negative / POST /readings - missing required field returns validation error
03_Negative / POST /readings - wrong enum value returns validation error

testcase.name: Wrong metric enum returns client error
Boundary value at max returns success

testsuite.name: 04_Boundary_Reliability / POST /readings - value 81 is rejected as out of range

testcase.name: Boundary test checks response, not request body

testsuite.name: 04_Boundary_Reliability / GET /readings/latest - limit above max is rejected

testcase.name: Limit above max returns client error

testsuite.name: 05_Consumer_side_Smoke / Consumer smoke - Camera/Core can call AI Vision mock
testsuite.system-err:
Iteration: 0 RequestError: Error: connect ECONNREFUSED 127.0.0.1:4011 at TCPConnectWrap.afterConnect [as oncomplete] (node:net:1637:16)
---

testcase.name: Consumer receives success from provider mock
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: fit4110-lab03-iot-ingestion. Collection name: FIT4110 Lab03 - IoT Ingestion Contract Tests. Request name: 05_Consumer_side_Smoke / Consumer smoke - Camera/Core can call AI Vision mock. Test description: Consumer receives success from provider mock. Error message: expected undefined to deeply equal 200. Stacktrace: AssertionError: expected undefined to deeply equal 200 at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:1:12).

testcase.name: Consumer can read detection fields
testcase.failure: Failed 1 times. Collection JSON ID: fit4110-lab03-iot-ingestion. Collection name: FIT4110 Lab03 - IoT Ingestion Contract Tests. Request name: 05_Consumer_side_Smoke / Consumer smoke - Camera/Core can call AI Vision mock. Test description: Consumer can read detection fields. Error message: "undefined" is not valid JSON. Stacktrace: JSONError: "undefined" is not valid JSON at Object.eval sandbox-script.js:2:12).

testcase.name: Skipped on mock: mock latency is not evidence of real service reliability
